title: Euronext CEO: Europe Benefiting from Volatility
title_cn: 泛欧交易所首席执行官：欧洲受益于波动
summary:
Euronext has posted first-quarter earnings that beat analysts' expectations, with profit driven higher by elevated market volatility and the newly acquired Athens stock exchange contributing to revenue.

Speaking exclusively to The Opening Trade, CEO Stéphane Boujnah said Europe is benefiting from a search for diversification coming from Asia and Middle East investors, who see the continent is less directly exposed to the Iran conflict. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: David Zahn Called the Gilt Rout. Now He’s Looking to Buy at 6%

title_cn: 科技多头期待英伟达股价复苏
summary: Rising bond yields have been weighing on chip stocks.

summary: Nickel drifted lower, trimming gains seen as Indonesia moved to tighten control over some of the country’s biggest commodities exports, including some forms of the metal.

summary: Emmanuel Macron’s nominee to run the Bank of France said he’s in favor of more joint debt issuance in the euro area for investment in the bloc’s new economic priorities.

title_cn: 随着债券寻求喘息，股市先于英伟达反弹：市场总结
summary: Stocks found some footing as the selloff in bonds eased and traders awaited earnings from Nvidia Corp., the world’s most valuable company and a linchpin of the artificial-intelligence trade.

title_cn: 交易员权衡特朗普最新的伊朗威胁，油价延续跌势
summary: Oil fell for a second day as traders weighed President Donald Trump’s latest threat to resume strikes on Iran.

summary: A benchmark Asia rice price rose to the highest in more than a year, as worries loom over harvests across the region.

title: UK Eases Russian Sanctions to Prevent Diesel and Jet Fuel Crunch
title_cn: 英国放松对俄罗斯的制裁以防止柴油和航空燃料短缺
summary: The UK moved to loosen its Russian sanctions in a controversial move aimed at preventing shortages of diesel and jet fuel, as the war in Iran eats into global oil buffers.

title: Singapore Tops Indonesia as Biggest Southeast Asia Stock Market
title_cn: 新加坡超越印度尼西亚成为东南亚最大股票市场
summary: Singapore has overtaken Indonesia as Southeast Asia’s largest stock market, signaling investors’ endorsement of the city-state’s market reforms and their diminishing confidence in the larger country’s economic management.

title: Indonesia’s Radical Export Experiment Upends Its Commodity Trade
title_cn: 印度尼西亚激进的出口实验颠覆了其商品贸易
summary: Indonesia’s radical plan to take control of key commodity exports has left the country’s coal miners, palm-oil producers and traders racing to understand details of a policy that throws into upheaval one of the country’s biggest industries.

title: ECB 'Quite' Likely to Hike in June If Iran War Unresolved, Wunsch Says
title_cn: Wunsch表示，如果伊朗战争未得到解决，欧洲央行“相当”可能在六月加息
summary: European Central Bank Governing Council member Pierre Wunsch discusses the impact of the Iran conflict on energy prices, inflation and monetary policy. "If the conflict is not resolved by June, then I think the likelihood of a hike is quite high," he tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Steadies as Iran War Impasse Keeps Rate Hike Bets High
title_cn: 伊朗战争僵局令加息押注高涨，金价稳定
summary: Gold steadied as a selloff in bonds eased, even as a lack of progress in reopening the Strait of Hormuz pushes traders to price in expectations of interest rate hikes from central banks this year.

title: Global Long Bond Yields Hit Highest in Almost Two Decades
title_cn: 全球长期债券收益率创近二十年来最高
summary: The selloff in longer-maturity government bonds has pushed up yields to levels last seen during the global financial crisis, and market participants are warning the move has room to run.

title: Global Bond Selloff Threatens Turmoil in Weakest Asian Economies
title_cn: 全球债券抛售可能导致亚洲最弱经济体陷入动荡
summary: Three of Asia’s most vulnerable economies are showing rising strains as their central banks come under pressure to tighten policy even as the economic hit from the Iran-war oil shock deepens.

title: Japan’s Nikkon Said to Weigh Going Private, US Funds May Bid
title_cn: 据称日本尼康正在考虑私有化，美国基金可能参与竞购
summary: Nikkon Holdings Co. is considering going private and the Japanese logistics company is preparing to hold a first round of bidding in early June, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: France’s Moulin Says Deficit Situation Serious, Not Catastrophic
title_cn: 法国红磨坊称赤字状况严重，而非灾难性
summary: Emmanuel Macron’s nominee to run the Bank of France said the country has a serious challenge to reduce its budget deficit, but the situation isn’t catastrophic.

title: USD Near-Term Driven by Fed, Hormuz Risks, ANZ’s Zaman Says
title_cn: 澳新银行 (ANZ) 扎曼表示，美元近期受到美联储和霍尔木兹风险的推动
summary:
Mounting inflation concerns have driven global bond yields higher, prompting investors to reassess valuations after a record-breaking rally in stocks. USD was at its highest level in six weeks with no sign of easing in the Iran conflict. Mahjabeen Zaman, Head of FX Research at ANZ spoke to Bloomberg’s Horizons Middle East and Africa anchor Joumanna Bercetche on the currency moves.

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Earnings Can Affirm Chip Stock Rally or Spur Market Chaos
title_cn: 英伟达的财报可能会证实芯片股上涨或刺激市场混乱
summary: For much of the year, chip stocks have been powering the market higher. Now, Nvidia Corp.’s earnings have a chance to confirm that the rally has more room to run — or add another brick to investors’ wall of worry.

title: Iran War Oil Disruption Prompts Nigeria Producers to Lift Output
title_cn: 伊朗战争石油中断促使尼日利亚生产商提高产量
summary: Nigerian oil companies are plowing windfall gains from the Iran-war crude rally into near-term extraction projects, boosting the drive by Africa’s top producer to double output within four years.

title: Bank Indonesia Surprises With a Half-Point Hike to Defend Rupiah
title_cn: 印尼央行意外加息半个百分点以捍卫卢比
summary: Indonesia’s central bank delivered a larger-than-expected interest-rate increase to intensify its defense of the rupiah after the currency tumbled to successive record lows this month.

title: Horizons Middle East & Africa 5/20/2026
title_cn: 中东和非洲地平线 5/20/2026
summary: Horizons Middle East & Africa is your daily spotlight on one of the world's fastest-growing regions. Live from Dubai, we bring you the latest global markets and analysis, plus news-making interviews, with a special focus on MEA. All that and more, as you head to the office in the Gulf, pause for lunch in Hong Kong, or start your day in London or Johannesburg.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Funds Ready for Further Rupee Weakness With 100 in Sight
title_cn: 全球基金已做好应对卢比进一步贬值的准备，卢比即将跌至 100
summary: Global investors expect the Indian rupee to weaken further, with some even gaming out scenarios where the currency falls to an unprecedented 100 per dollar.

title: ECB’s Wunsch Sees June Hike Quite Likely If War Doesn’t End
title_cn: 欧洲央行行长 Wunsch 认为，如果战争不结束，六月加息的可能性很大
summary: There’s a high probability that the European Central Bank will raise borrowing costs next month if the Iran war doesn’t end in the meantime, according to Governing Council member Pierre Wunsch.

title: Gilts Jump as UK Inflation Surprise Curbs Rate-Hike Wagers
title_cn: 英国通胀意外抑制加息押注，英国国债大幅上涨
summary: Gilts rallied as a sharper-than-expected slowdown in UK inflation prompted traders to trim bets on a Bank of England interest-rate hike next month.

title: La cepa Bundibugyo del ébola preocupa a la OMS: esto es lo que hay que saber
title_cn: 埃博拉病毒本迪布焦株令世界卫生组织担忧：这是你需要知道的
summary: La OMS emitió una alerta global por un nuevo brote de ébola causado por la rara cepa Bundibugyo, para la que no existen vacunas aprobadas ni tratamientos específicos. Te explicamos por qué este brote preocupa y qué podría dificultar su contención.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Palladium Imports Surge as Local Futures Lure Inflows
title_cn: 由于本地期货吸引资金流入，中国钯金进口激增
summary: China imported a record amount of palladium last month, as local prices that have raced ahead of global ones lured inflows.

title: AI’s Promises Are Starting to Materialize – With a Human Cost
title_cn: 人工智能的承诺开始实现——但付出了人力成本
summary: Markets are being built around it, powered by it, and priced because of it. But AI comes with a hefty human toll.

title: Meta Starts 8,000 Global Job Cuts in AI Efficiency Push
title_cn: Meta 开始在全球范围内裁员 8,000 人以推动人工智能效率
summary: Meta is alerting thousands of employees that they’re being laid off, part of a previously announced restructuring aimed at reducing costs while the company invests heavily in artificial intelligence. The company began notifying workers around the world Wednesday morning, starting with employees across Asia, who got the note at 4 a.m. Singapore time. US-based staff are also expected to receive word during their morning, according to an internal memo. Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intesa, ABN Amro Join Stablecoin Push to Blunt Dollar Dominance
title_cn: Intesa、ABN Amro 加入稳定币行列，削弱美元主导地位
summary: A consortium of European banks seeking to launch a euro-denominated stablecoin has added 25 lenders to its ranks, speeding up efforts to build a viable alternative to dollar-denominated digital money.

title: Court Adviser Says Bolloré Controls Vivendi in Shareholder Spat
title_cn: 法院顾问称 Bolloré 在股东纠纷中控制着维旺迪
summary: Billionaire Vincent Bolloré controlled Vivendi SE before a split of the media conglomerate in 2024, a Paris advocate general is set to say, a positive step for minority holders who want the billionaire to buy them out.

title: Samsung Faces Chip Plant Strike That Threatens Global Supply
title_cn: 三星面临芯片工厂罢工，威胁全球供应
summary: Talks between Samsung Electronics Co. and its largest labor union broke down, raising the prospect of a strike that may disrupt global chip supply and hamper an important engine of Korean economic growth.

title: Tinder Is Betting Gen Z Daters Would Rather Be Offline
title_cn: Tinder 认为 Z 世代约会者宁愿离线
summary: The dating app’s turnaround bets on live events, group dating and an AI-heavy redesign.

title: Meta Begins 8,000 Global Job Cuts in AI Efficiency Push
title_cn: Meta 开始在全球范围内裁员 8,000 人以推动人工智能效率
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is alerting thousands of employees that they’re being laid off, part of a previously announced restructuring aimed at reducing costs while the company invests heavily in artificial intelligence.

title: Samsung Braces For Disruption After Labor Talks Collapse | The China Show 5/20/2026
title_cn: 劳资谈判破裂后，三星准备迎接颠覆|中国展 2026 年 5 月 20 日
summary: “Bloomberg: The China Show” is your definitive source for news and analysis on the world's second-biggest economy. From politics and policy to tech and trends, Yvonne Man and Avril Hong give global investors unique insight, delivering in-depth discussions with the newsmakers who matter.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: GHO and CBC Combine to Form $21 Billion Healthcare Asset Manager
title_cn: GHO 和 CBC 合并组建 210 亿美元的医疗保健资产管理公司
summary: Global Healthcare Opportunities and CBC Group have agreed to combine to create a healthcare investment firm with more than $21 billion of assets under management, according to a statement Wednesday.

title: BloombergNEF's New Energy Outlook 2026
title_cn: 彭博新能源财经 2026 年新能源展望
summary: The energy crisis sparked by the war in Iran provides a stark backdrop for BloombergNEF's 2026 edition of the New Energy Outlook. David Hostert, Chief Economist at BloombergNEF spoke with Bloomberg TV's Lizzy Burden about flagship report on long-term energy and climate scenarios.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Samsung Workers to Go Ahead With Strike
title_cn: 三星工人将继续罢工
summary: Talks between Samsung Electronics and its largest labor union broke down, raising the prospect of a workers’ strike. A general work stoppage will go ahead on Thursday, labor leader Choi Seung-ho told reporters. The collapse in negotiations puts the global technology supply chain at risk because Samsung is the world’s biggest supplier of the chips that go into devices from data center servers to smartphones and electric vehicles. Bloomberg's Yoolim Lee reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China’s Biotech Boom, AI Limits and Regulatory Edge
title_cn: 中国生物技术的繁荣、人工智能的限制和监管优势
summary:
China’s healthcare and biotechnology sector is expanding rapidly, driven by scale, speed and a more efficient drug‑approval regime. This segment examines how artificial intelligence is helping cut early drug‑design costs, while leaving much of the expensive clinical and manufacturing process unchanged.
The discussion also looks at why China has become a global leader in clinical trials and biotech infrastructure, and how more realistic valuations are reshaping public markets in Hong Kong.
Simone Song, Founding Partner of Ori Capital, joined David Ingles from the sidelines of Sohn Hong Kong Investment Leaders Conference on Insight with Haslinda Amin to share her outlook on the sector and its risks.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tesla and Robotaxis 'Are About to Take Off,' Cathie Wood Says
title_cn: 凯西·伍德 (Cathie Wood) 表示，特斯拉和 Robotaxis“即将起飞”
summary: Cathie Wood of Ark Investment Management says "the largest revenue generating opportunity from AI, in terms of embodied AI, is going to be in transportation." She tells Bloomberg's David Ingles that Tesla and robotaxis "are about to take off." (Source: Other)

title: Alibaba Unveils New AI Chip for Training and Inferencing
title_cn: 阿里巴巴推出用于训练和推理的新型人工智能芯片
summary: Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. added a new processor to its expanding AI technology stack, enhancing a push to cover every aspect of artificial intelligence development.

title: AustralianSuper Hires AI Chief as Pension Funds Race to Adapt
title_cn: AustralianSuper 聘请人工智能主管，养老基金竞相适应
summary: AustralianSuper, the nation’s largest pension fund, has hired its first head of artificial intelligence as the industry grapples with how rapidly evolving technology could reshape retirement finance.

title: Block's Jennings Says Spending Seems Resilient Right Now
title_cn: 布洛克的詹宁斯表示，目前的支出似乎具有弹性
summary: Block's Business Lead Owen Jennings speaks with Bloomberg Television’s Lisa Abramowicz at the JPMorgan Global Technology, Media and Communications Conference in Boston.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tencent-Backer IDG Capital Sets Sights on $2 Billion Growth Fund
title_cn: 腾讯投资方 IDG 资本瞄准 20 亿美元成长基金
summary: IDG Capital, an investment firm that has backed Tencent Holdings Ltd. and Coinbase Global Inc., is seeking to raise about $2 billion for a growth fund, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: SpaceX Is Planning to Buy Startup Cursor 30 Days After IPO
title_cn: SpaceX 计划在 IPO 30 天后收购初创公司 Cursor
summary: SpaceX expects to proceed with its acquisition of artificial intelligence coding startup Cursor 30 days after Elon Musk’s company begins trading publicly, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Goldman Sachs on data in the age of AI
title_cn: 高盛谈人工智能时代的数据
summary: Neema Raphael, Chief Data Officer & Head of Data Engineering, Goldman Sachs discusses the importance of data in the age of AI with Bloomberg's Lisa Mateo at the Building an AI Future-Ready Business event. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Elevance Health, MetLife and Capital One on AI workflows
title_cn: Elevance Health、MetLife 和 Capital One 探讨人工智能工作流程
summary: Ratnakar Lavu, EVP, Chief Digital Information Officer, Elevance Health, Nick Nadgauda, EVP, Global Chief Information Officer, MetLife, and Sharmila Ravi, SVP, Card Technology, Capital One discuss optimizing business outcomes with intelligent workflows with Bloomberg's Niraj Patel at the Building an AI Future-Ready Business event. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Intelligence on AI agents in the enterprise.
title_cn: 彭博资讯关于企业中的人工智能代理。
summary: Niraj Patel, Senior Software Analyst, Bloomberg Intelligence discusses the rise of AI agents in the enterprise and how they are disrupting the software stack on Bloomberg's Building an AI Future-Ready Business event. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Panasonic, New York Life, Kyndryl, Citizens on strategies for the human plus AI workforce.
title_cn: 松下、纽约人寿、Kyndryl、Citizens 关于人类和人工智能劳动力的战略。
summary: Liz Almeida, Chief Human Resources Officer, Panasonic Corporation of North America, Kathleen Navarro, Senior Vice President, Head of HR Business Enablement & Chief Diversity Officer, New York Life, Jamie Rutledge, President, Kyndryl U.S.and Michael Ruttledge, Chief Information Officer & Head of Technology Services, Citizens Financial Group discuss strategies for upskilling the workforce to fully leverage agentic AI with Bloomberg's Seth Fiegerman at Building an AI Future-Ready Business. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: JPMorgan’s CIO Sees Leadership Test as AI Fuels Major Shift
title_cn: 摩根大通首席信息官将领导力测试视为人工智能推动重大转变
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. faces a daunting management challenge from artificial intelligence as the bank reaps productivity benefits while racing to contain a new set of risks, Global Chief Information Officer Lori Beer said.

title: Goldman Sachs to Lead SpaceX’s Mega-IPO Bank Lineup
title_cn: 高盛将领导 SpaceX 大型 IPO 银行阵容
summary: Goldman Sachs Group Inc. has the leading role on the cover of SpaceX’s initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter, giving the firm a prominent position in potentially the biggest listing of all time.

title: Chip Stocks Bounce as Yields Retreat From Highs | The Close 5/19/2026
title_cn: 随着收益率从高点回落，芯片股反弹收盘价 2026 年 5 月 19 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Alger Investments’ Ankur Crawford, JP Morgan’s Chief US Economist Michael Feroli, Guggenheim Securities’ Simeon Siegel, Saks Global CEO Geoffroy van Raemdonck, Union Square Advisors President & Co-Founder Ted Smith, Gerber Kawasaki’s Co-Founder, President & CEO Ross Gerber, Ark Investment Management Chief Futurist Brett Winton, Allen Media Group Founder, Chairman & CEO Byron Allen, & Atomic Monster President Michael Clear. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What Byron Allen Has Planned for Buzzfeed, Late-Night Show
title_cn: 拜伦·艾伦 (Byron Allen) 为 Buzzfeed 深夜秀计划了什么
summary: Byron Allen, founder, chair and CEO of Allen Media Group, discusses his plans to turn Buzzfeed into a free-TV super app. Speaking with Romaine Bostick on "Bloomberg The Close," Allen also comments on taking over Stephen Colbert's "Late Show" time slot. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SoftBank Insiders Worry About Masayoshi Son’s Bet on OpenAI
title_cn: 软银内部人士担心孙正义押注 OpenAI
summary: On today’s Big Take Asia podcast, why Masayoshi Son’s $60 billion investment in OpenAI is raising concerns inside SoftBank.

title: Analog Devices to Acquire Empower in $1.5 Billion Transaction
title_cn: Analog Devices 将斥资 15 亿美元收购 Empower
summary: Analog Devices Inc. agreed to acquire closely held Empower Semiconductor for $1.5 billion in cash as the need skyrockets for efficient chips to power data centers required for artificial intelligence.

title: US Senate Signals Mounting Opposition to Trump’s War in Iran
title_cn: 美国参议院发出信号，反对特朗普发动伊朗战争
summary: The Republican-led US Senate signaled rising opposition to continuing the Iran war in a procedural vote Tuesday. Louisiana Senator Bill Cassidy, whose re-election bid President Donald Trump thwarted in a Republican primary Saturday, joined three other GOP senators voting to clear the hurdle and move toward a final vote on a resolution to cease hostilities. Kate Ackley of Bloomberg Government has more.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Tightens GOP Grip With Massie’s Defeat in Kentucky
title_cn: 特朗普因马西在肯塔基州的失败而加强了共和党的控制
summary: Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for a congressional seat in Northern Kentucky, Ed Gallrein, was victorious in one of the most expensive primaries on record, defeating the president’s nemesis and longtime GOP House member Thomas Massie. Kate Ackley of Bloomberg Government has more. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Battle Over the Spoils of AI Is Just Beginning
title_cn: 人工智能战利品之战才刚刚开始
summary: Workers demand a bigger share of the profit from artificial intelligence.

title: Reeves Floats Price Freezes on Food in Bid to Cut UK Bills
title_cn: 里夫斯浮动食品价格冻结以削减英国账单
summary: Chancellor of the Exchequer Rachel Reeves has privately proposed voluntary price freezes on food in supermarkets, as the UK government seeks to ease cost of living pressures for struggling Britons.

title: Ukraine Says It Attacked Russia’s Major Norsi Oil Refinery Again
title_cn: 乌克兰称再次袭击俄罗斯主要诺尔西炼油厂
summary: Ukraine said it attacked a major oil refinery in central Russia for the second time this week, as Kyiv continues to target the country’s energy infrastructure.

title: Philippine Court Rejects ICC-Wanted Senator’s Bid to Stop Arrest
title_cn: 菲律宾法院驳回国际刑事法院通缉参议员的停止逮捕请求
summary: The Philippines’ Supreme Court on Wednesday denied a petition by a senator wanted by the International Criminal Court to stop his arrest, a move that may set off a manhunt for the missing lawmaker at the center of the nation’s political crisis.

title: French Presidential Contender Philippe Faces Embezzlement Probe
title_cn: 法国总统候选人菲利普面临贪污调查
summary: Edouard Philippe, the French center-right’s leading contender for next year’s presidential election, faces a probe into alleged embezzlement and conflict of interest.

title: US May Ask Bulgaria to Extend Air Logistics Help, Radev Says
title_cn: 拉德夫表示，美国可能要求保加利亚提供航空物流帮助
summary: The US is likely to ask Bulgaria to extend the stay of its tanker aircraft that have been based in Sofia since shortly before it started strikes on Iran, Prime Minister Rumen Radev said.

title: Malaysia Coalition to Stay Intact Until Term Ends, Says Minister
title_cn: 部长表示，马来西亚联盟将保持不变直至任期结束
summary: Malaysia’s unity government will remain intact until the end of its term amid speculation of snap elections, according to Communications Minister Fahmi Fadzil.

title: Xi and Putin Hail Partnership While Signing Pacts to Deepen Ties
title_cn: 习近平和普京在签署深化关系协议的同时赞扬伙伴关系
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping and his Russian counterpart Vladimir Putin praised the strength of their relationship during talks in Beijing as both countries seek to reinforce bilateral ties in the shadow of wars in Ukraine and Iran.

title: Been Sanctioned by the US Government? There’s a Guy for That
title_cn: 被美国政府制裁了吗？有一个人可以做到这一点
summary: From Iran to Russia to Venezuela, targeted parties tap Erich Ferrari to get off the Treasury Department’s list.

title: Cyprus Gets Back EU Finance Ministers Scared Off by Drone Attack
title_cn: 塞浦路斯找回被无人机袭击吓跑的欧盟财长
summary: For Cyprus’s embattled tourist industry, this week’s arrival of 27 European Union finance ministers with an entourage of central bankers and officials is better late than never.

title: Japan’s Takaichi Aims to Avoid Large Bond Sales for Extra Budget
title_cn: 日本高一的目标是避免为额外预算而出售大量债券
summary: Japan’s Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi said she expects to compile an extra budget without relying too heavily on bond issuance for the funding.

title: UBS Capital Debate in Parliament Puts Bill on Easing Track
title_cn: 议会中的瑞银资本辩论将法案推向宽松轨道
summary: The parliamentary debate of new capital requirements for UBS Group AG earlier this month focused only on softening the government plan, putting the process on track for an outcome below the current estimate of $20 billion.

title: US Wants Ukraine to Help Ease Restrictions on Belarus Potash
title_cn: 美国希望乌克兰帮助放宽对白俄罗斯钾肥的限制
summary: The US is pushing Ukraine to ease restrictions on imports of potash fertilizers from Belarus and has asked Kyiv to make the case with European nations to do so as well, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: China's Xi Hosts Putin, Steps Up Call for Iran Ceasefire | Daybreak Europe 05/20/2026
title_cn: 中国习近平会见普京，加强呼吁伊朗停火欧洲黎明 05/20/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, the Chinese President Xi Jinping warned against resuming military operations in the Middle East, at the start of talks with his Russian counterpart Vladimir Putin. Xi stepped up calls for a truce, saying "a comprehensive ceasefire is imperative". US President Trump has threatened to resume strikes on Iran in the coming days if there's no deal to end the war.

Talks between Samsung and its largest labor union have broken down, with workers planning to go on strike on Thursday. A walkout at the world's largest memory chipmaker risks disrupting the global technology supply chain. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump's Kentucky Pick Gallrein Defeats Massie in Primary
title_cn: 特朗普的肯塔基州选秀加莱因在初选中击败马西
summary: Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate for a congressional seat in Northern Kentucky, Ed Gallrein, defeated the US president’s nemesis and longtime GOP House member Thomas Massie. "My focus is on advancing the president's and the party's agenda to put America first and Kentucky always," Gallrein, a former Navy SEAL and farmer, said at a victory speech. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EU Expedites Start of US Trade Deal
title_cn: 欧盟加快启动美国贸易协议
summary: The European Union finalized the text of its US trade deal after months of negotiations, clearing a major hurdle to ratifying the pact before President Donald Trump’s deadline. The deal would see the EU erase levies on US industrial goods in exchange for a 15% tariff ceiling on the bloc’s exports. Bloomberg's Oliver Crook reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Diplomat Who Filled In for Mandelson in Washington Exits Post
title_cn: 接替曼德尔森驻华盛顿的英国外交官离职
summary: A senior diplomat who oversaw the British Embassy in Washington in the wake of Peter Mandelson’s departure last year has abruptly left his role.

title: Trump Threatens Iran Strikes If There’s No Deal Soon
title_cn: 特朗普威胁称，如果短期内无法达成协议，将对伊朗发动袭击
summary: US President Donald Trump threatened to resume strikes on Iran in the coming days as part of the push for a deal to end the war. Meanwhile, NATO is discussing the possibility of helping ships pass through the blocked Strait of Hormuz if the waterway isn’t reopened by early July, according to a senior official in the military alliance. Bloomberg's Stuart Livingstone-Wallace reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Welcomes Putin for China Talks
title_cn: 习近平欢迎普京来华会谈
summary: Chinese leader Xi Jinping welcomed Russian President Vladimir Putin to Beijing for talks aiming to reinforce bilateral ties and make progress on a long-stalled energy project. Bloomberg's Stephen Engle reports from Beijing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Greets Putin at Welcome Ceremony in Beijing
title_cn: 习近平在北京欢迎仪式上向普京致意
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping greets Russian leader Vladimir Putin at a full ceremonial welcome in Beijing, including military honor guard and cannon salute outside the Great Hall of the People. (Source: Other)

title: Taiwan’s President Vows Peace After Trump Aired Worry About War
title_cn: 特朗普表达对战争的担忧后，台湾总统誓言和平
summary: President Lai Ching-te has portrayed Taiwan as a steady hand in its face-off with China, comments aimed at easing President Donald Trump’s worries about a conflict erupting.

title: Xi, Putin Sign Pacts Spanning Trade to Energy
title_cn: 习近平与普京签署涵盖贸易和能源的协议
summary: Xi Jinping and Vladimir Putin inspect an honor guard during a welcoming ceremony at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing on May 20. Photographer: Maxim Shemetov/AP Photo

title: EU Expedites Start of US Trade Deal in Bow to Trump Demand
title_cn: 欧盟应特朗普要求加快启动美国贸易协议
summary: The European Union finalized the text of its long-delayed US trade deal after months of negotiations, clearing a major hurdle to ratifying the pact before President Donald Trump’s threatened deadline to impose higher tariffs.

title: US Defense Department Says It Will Cut an Army Brigade in Europe
title_cn: 美国国防部表示将削减驻欧洲的一个陆军旅
summary: The Pentagon said it was permanently cutting about 4,000 soldiers from Europe as part of a broader review of forces that has generated anxiety among US allies on the continent and elsewhere in the world.

title: Why Taiwan Is the Hottest Issue Between the US and China
title_cn: 为什么台湾是中美之间最热门的问题
summary: Wealthy, democratic and strategically located off the Chinese coast, Taiwan has long been the most volatile issue between the US and China.

title: Kast Sacks Security Minister Two Months Into His Administration
title_cn: 卡斯特在上任两个月后解雇了安全部长
summary: President José Antonio Kast sacked his Security Minister just over two months into the start of his government, raising questions over the delivery of his core pledges to cut crime and illegal immigration.
